programme.title: The Great Train Robbery
programme.desc: Sean Connery plans to steal a fortune in gold from a railroad payroll car and joins forces with safecracker Donald Sutherland and his own girlfriend, Lesley Anne Down, in a series of intricately plotted thefts that will test their larcenous skills.

programme.title: The Taking Of Pelham One Two Three (1974)
programme.desc: A gang hijacks a subway train and threatens to kill hostages one by one until their demands are met. Forced to stall, transit chief Lt. Garber (Walter Matthau) must outmaneuver one of the craftiest and cruelest screen villains (Robert Shaw) ever.

programme.title: Runaway Train
programme.desc: Jon Voight and Eric Roberts turn in Oscar®-nominated performances as a pair of escaped convicts who hop a freight train, but when the engineer dies of a heart attack, they find themselves trapped, alone and speeding toward certain disaster.

programme.title: Valkyrie
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Colonel Claus von Stauffenberg (Tom Cruise) and his assassination plot targeting Adolph Hitler, this engrossing thriller reenacts the daring operation to eliminate one of the most evil tyrants the world has ever known.

programme.title: Windtalkers
programme.desc: John Woo directs this epic, action-packed drama about a WW II soldier (Nicolas Cage) assigned to protect a Navajo soldier (Adam Beach)...and the secret code he knows. Christian Slater, Roger Willie, Peter Stormare and Mark Ruffalo also star.

programme.title: Red Dawn
programme.desc: The invasion has begun! Patrick Swayze, C. Thomas Howell, Lea Thompson and Charlie Sheen wage unremitting guerilla warfare in defense of their parents, their friends, their town and their country when Communist invaders storm their hometown.

programme.title: Platoon
programme.desc: Inspired by Oliver Stone's own experiences, this anti-war epic tells the tale of PFC Chris Taylor (Charlie Sheen), an Army recruit sent to Vietnam, who witnesses the atrocities of war – many of which are carried out by his comrades.

programme.title: Navy Seals
programme.desc: Charlie Sheen, Michael Biehn and Bill Paxton are three of America's finest Navy commandos. Sent to rescue the crew of a U.S. aircraft carrying Stinger missiles seized by Mideast terrorists, they're thrust onto the frontline of an explosive conflict!

programme.title: The Delta Force
programme.desc: Political extremists have taken innocent people hostage…and only super-soldiers Chuck Norris, Lee Marvin and The Delta Force can rescue them in this explosive adventure filled with wall-to-wall action! Martin Balsam and Shelley Winters also star.

programme.title: Delta Force 2: The Colombian Connection
programme.desc: Chuck Norris is in peak form in this explosive action/adventure that brings back one of his most unforgettable characters, Delta Force Colonel Scott McCoy, for a daring mission to destroy a deadly drug cartel led by the ruthless Billy Drago!

programme.title: Death Wish II
programme.desc: Paul Kersey (Charles Bronson) is no victim: He fights back – with a vengeance! After beginning a new life in L.A., Kersey's daughter is viciously assaulted. Now, he won't rest until he tracks the assailants down...and puts them all in the ground!

programme.title: Death Wish 3
programme.desc: A battle-weary Paul Kersey (Charles Bronson) longs to leave his fighting days behind him. But when he arrives in New York to visit a friend and finds him brutally attacked, the silent avenger must wage war again in this no-holds-barred thriller!
